LanguageData.RT_Saltwater_SaltwaterZone_description: Allows to grow Merren specialties of fibrekelp and quackweed. They are hardy enough to grow in saltwater.
LanguageData.RT_Saltwater_MarineAgricultureLabel: Allows the zone to cover ocean tiles
LanguageData.RT_Saltwater_MarineAgricultureTooltip: On by default. No idea how well ocean water is tagged in other mods, so if you turn it off it may not always work.
LanguageData.RT_Saltwater_IndustrialRunoffTooLabel: Allows the zone to cover polluted tiles
LanguageData.RT_Saltwater_IndustrialRunoffTooTooltip: Off by default. Excluded for convenience: I'm yet to see a mod with cultivated plants which grow in polluted water. Perhaps I don't play enough mods. Report if you see something fun here, alright?
LanguageData.RT_Saltwater_WarnPreferenceMismatch: {0} cannot be sown in the entire zone because of water preference mismatch
